prompt: Compare docs.anthropic.com vs platform.openai.com — focus on AEO and GEO

assertions.text: Report file exists matching comparison naming convention *-compare-*-vs-*.md
Report contains a side-by-side comparison table with scores for both domains
Report focuses on AEO and GEO categories — no SEO Technical, SEO On-Page, or Structured Data scoring
Report contains data from both docs.anthropic.com AND platform.openai.com (not just one site)
Report includes a top 3 fixes section for each site
Report identifies which site performs better per category with reasoning
